description_long: This house features a modern, open-plan layout with a flat roof and large windows that allow ample natural light into the interior. The exterior is primarily white with wooden accents, including a tall privacy fence that encloses the property on three sides. Two prominent pink-blossomed trees are positioned at the front, adding vibrant color and a sense of privacy to the yard. The house includes a spacious outdoor patio area, visible from the rear, and a small garden space along the side. The main entryway is marked by a set of double doors and a small porch, while the interior is divided into distinct living, dining, and bedroom areas. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, functional outdoor spaces, and a harmonious blend with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large windows, white walls, wooden fencing, and two striking pink-blossomed trees in the front yard. The design features open-plan interiors, a spacious patio, and a prominent entryway.
description_view_0: This view highlights the side of the house with the patio, wooden fencing, and one of the pink-blossomed trees, as well as the open-plan interior layout.
description_view_1: The front view shows the main entryway with double doors, both pink-blossomed trees, and the symmetrical arrangement of windows and fencing.
description_view_2: This angle displays the rear of the house, the garden area, and the flat roof, with a clear view of the side windows and outdoor seating.
description_view_3: The opposite front view emphasizes the two pink-blossomed trees, the main entryway, and the overall symmetry of the house's facade.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and grouped panels
attribute_entryway_design: Double doors with a small porch, flanked by large windows and accessed via a paved path, no overhang or columns.
